source_note: EDHREC Average Deck pages fetched once at low volume for offline corpus analysis. Because the local card DB on 2026-05-13 does not resolve several new Secrets of Strixhaven support cards, this artifact is an EDHREC-derived local-resolvable projection: unresolved support cards were replaced with on-theme Golgari sacrifice/value staples already resolvable locally. Runtime generation consumes aggregate role/card signals only, not copied decklists.

decks.local_resolution_note: Source-derived projection; unresolved local DB cards replaced before dry-run.
